description_long: This is a four-story commercial building with a steep, reddish-brown gabled roof featuring dormer windows. The facade is primarily composed of red brick with white stone or concrete framing around the windows and structural elements. The ground floor is dedicated to a clothing store, with large glass display windows and a red-framed entrance, allowing visibility into the shop interior. The upper floors have regularly spaced, white-framed windows, suggesting residential or office use above the retail space. The building's architectural style is reminiscent of early 20th-century European urban design, with symmetrical features and decorative window sills. The storefront is vibrant and inviting, with visible displays and mannequins showcasing clothing to passersby.
description: A four-story brick commercial building with a red gabled roof and a vibrant clothing store on the ground floor, featuring large display windows and visible mannequins.
description_view_0: The building is seen from a slight angle, showing the red gabled roof, three dormer windows, and the detailed brick and stone facade with large storefront windows below.
description_view_1: This view is more frontal, highlighting the symmetry of the windows and the central dormer, with the storefront and display windows clearly visible.
description_view_2: A nearly direct front view, emphasizing the central alignment of the windows and the prominent red-framed display windows at street level.
description_view_3: Another frontal perspective, similar to view 2, but slightly offset, showing the repetitive window pattern and the inviting storefront.
attribute_storefront_signage: Red signage above the display windows with white text, likely indicating the store name or brand.
attribute_display_windows: Three large rectangular display windows on the ground floor, framed in red, showcasing store displays and mannequins.
attribute_mannequins: Several mannequins are visible in the display windows, dressed in various clothing items and positioned to face the street.
attribute_clothing_racks_visible_from_ou: Clothing racks are visible through the display windows, arranged parallel to the glass and displaying assorted garments.
